name: Ball Guys
author: Poki
description: Ball Guys is a party game where you can play solo or join up to 256 players online in a hilarious battle royale! Pull back, aim, and launch yourself through wacky maps full of unpredictable obstacles, racing through knockout rounds and crazy challenges to be the last one standing. Create private rooms to challenge friends, unlock fun rewards, and prove who has the best aim and fastest launches. Ready to stumble, fall, and race your way to victory? How to play Ball Guys? Click and hold to aim, release to shoot. Who created Ball Guys? Ball Guys is created by Half Moon Studios. Play their other games on Poki: Picture it? ! How can I play Ball Guys for free? You can play Ball Guys for free on Poki. Can I play Ball Guys on mobile devices and desktop? Ball Guys can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Ball Guys with my friend? Yes! Ball Guys is a single or online multiplayer game so you can play with your friend online!
